governanceSafeConfig.description: Governance Safe - controls timelock proposals (5 signers, threshold 3)
governanceSafeConfig.note: For local development, Safes are typically not deployed. Use Sepolia or Mainnet for actual Safe deployment.

emergencySafeConfig.description: Emergency Safe - break-glass pause functionality (3 signers, threshold 2)
emergencySafeConfig.note: For local development, Safes are typically not deployed. Use Sepolia or Mainnet for actual Safe deployment.

_instructions.governanceSafe: Replace 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 with actual Governance Safe address (for local: typically not deployed)
_instructions.emergencySafe: Replace 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 with actual Emergency Safe address (for local: typically not deployed)
_instructions.deploymentGuide: See documentation/api/contracts/governance/GOVERNANCE.md for detailed Safe deployment instructions
